name: Contra
description: Konami's run-and-gun action franchise about commandos, alien threats, and relentless co-op shooting.

eras.title: Classic Run-and-Gun Era
eras.description: Arcade, NES, SNES, and Genesis entries that define the fast co-op run-and-gun formula.

eras.title: Experimentation Era
eras.description: 3D attempts and later returns to stricter action design.

eras.title: Legacy Revival Era
eras.description: Revivals, re-releases, and retro-styled attempts to recapture classic Contra.
